stories.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6, its newest frontier model family
stories.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.6, the latest generation of its flagship model. The launch was the most-discussed story on Hacker News with over 1,500 upvotes, and TechCrunch reports it is already positioned as the preferred model for Microsoft Copilot 365.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft by ex-employees
stories.summary: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing former Apple employees of stealing trade secrets and bringing them to the AI company. The case is one of the highest-profile legal battles between tech giants over AI talent.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.summary: Meta pulled a controversial AI-powered feature from Instagram following significant user backlash. The move highlights growing tension between AI integration and user privacy preferences on social media platforms.

stories.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra produces proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture
stories.summary: OpenAI's most capable model variant, GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra, produced a formal proof of the long-standing Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in graph theory — a landmark moment for AI-assisted mathematics.

stories.title: Hugging Face CEO: Open source AI matters more than ever
stories.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue argued that companies are increasingly moving away from renting AI models toward owning their own. He made the case that open source AI is critical for a healthy ecosystem and corporate independence.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history
stories.summary: Memory chip giant SK Hynix raised a record-breaking $26.5 billion in the largest-ever foreign IPO on a US exchange. The company is also being urged to build new US fabs to meet surging AI chip demand.

stories.title: How the terrorist group Boko Haram uses frontier AI
stories.summary: A new report reveals how the terrorist organization Boko Haram has leveraged frontier AI models for operational planning and propaganda. The findings raise urgent questions about AI safety guardrails and dual-use technology.

stories.title: AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%
stories.summary: Amazon Web Services reported that a GraphRAG-based deployment has reduced pharmaceutical drug research cycles by 87%, dramatically accelerating the timeline for drug discovery and clinical pipeline development.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI's No. 2 role
stories.summary: Fidji Simo has stepped down from her position as OpenAI's second-in-command. The leadership shakeup comes amid major model launches and ongoing questions about the company's organizational structure.

stories.title: Meta enters the AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
stories.summary: Meta launched Muse Spark 1.1, its new AI coding model, entering an increasingly competitive market alongside GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and other AI-powered development tools.
